_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with intelligence analysts/targeting organizations involved in related areas.
reference_document_element_description: Design and execute research projects that advance organizational AI capability, including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, execution, and findings documentation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-018 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.542), LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analysts, areas, collaborate, intelligence, involved, organizations] vs WIDAI-only terms [advance, ai, capability, design, documentation, execute] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.865, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Collaborate with intelligence analysts/targeting organizations involved in relat" and "Design and execute research projects that advance organizational AI capability," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.544 ≈ STS 0.547 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analysts, areas, collaborate, intelligence, involved, organizations]. WIDAI terms: [advance, ai, capability, design, documentation, execute].
